name: helios-azure-cli
description: Safe Azure CLI setup, OIDC planning, and Bicep what-if workflows for HELIOS.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and validate HELIOS Azure setup safely.
interface.longDescription: A guarded Azure CLI wizard for HELIOS. It checks local prerequisites, signs in interactively, validates canonical GitHub OIDC settings, previews Bicep deployments with Azure what-if, and blocks cloud mutations unless the protected rollout gates and explicit confirmation are present.
interface.defaultPrompt: Check my HELIOS Azure setup and show the safest next action without deploying anything.
